name: Agiloft Contract Lifecycle Management API
what_it_does: Agiloft REST API for enterprise contract lifecycle management (CLM) platform. Enables AI agents to create and manage contract records, retrieve contract metadata and obligation data, manage approval workflows, trigger contract creation from procurement or sales events, search contract repositories, track milestones and renewals, and integrate CLM data with ERP, CRM, and procurement systems.
use_cases: Creating contract records from procurement requisitions via contract initiation agents
Retrieving contract obligation and milestone data from compliance monitoring agents
Managing contract approval routing from legal process automation agents
Searching contract repositories for specific clause types from contract analysis agents
not_for: Simple document e-signature without contract lifecycle workflow
Small business without formal contract management processes
AI-first contract intelligence without structured CLM workflow requirements
best_when: A large enterprise or government agency with complex contract lifecycle requirements wants AI agents to automate contract initiation, approval routing, obligation tracking, and integration with ERP and procurement systems.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Contract obligations create legally binding financial commitments. Agiloft's no-code customization means data models vary by deployment — understand the specific configuration before automating.

auth.notes: Agiloft uses REST API with API key and OAuth 2.0 authentication. Per-deployment credentials. No-code platform means API schema varies by customer configuration — each deployment may expose different fields.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise CLM pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts; implementation fees apply; no-code customization included
pricing.notes: Redwood City, CA. Strong government and regulated-industry presence. No-code platform allows extensive customization. FedRAMP Authorized — government contract management use cases.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; enterprise SLAs available

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Contract obligations create binding commitments — validate all automated contract actions
No public MCP server — REST API per-deployment
No-code platform means API schema is DEPLOYMENT-SPECIFIC — each customer has different fields/tables
FedRAMP authorized for US government use — understand GovCloud vs commercial deployment differences
Implementation partner typically required — self-service setup is complex
API schema documentation must be generated per deployment — no universal OpenAPI spec
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Contract obligation data. SOC2, FedRAMP, GDPR, ISO27001. OAuth2 and API key. US/EU data residency. Government-grade security available.

security_score_components.security_notes: Contract legal and financial data. SOC2, FedRAMP, GDPR, ISO27001. OAuth2 and API key. US/EU data residency.
